content: Just as RefleXion's SCINTIT therapy selectively targets only malignant tumor lesions while leaving healthy tissue unharmed, we can design working memory management for AI agents that selectively retains and activates only high-relevance reasoning context, pruning low-value, distractive memory traces to bypass the inherent capacity limits of agent working memory. This approach reframes the working memory limit problem from a hardware constraint to a curation challenge, borrowing targeted intervention principles from precision oncology.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
